---
title: "Statistical Inference Questions Using the Penguins Dataset"
---


## Dataset

```r
install.packages("palmerpenguins")
library(palmerpenguins)

data("penguins")
head(penguins)
```

## Questions

1. A researcher claims that male penguins have a higher mean body mass than female penguins. Is there sufficient statistical evidence to support this claim?

2. Is there a significant difference in the mean body mass among different penguin species?

3. If there is a significant difference in body mass among species, which species pairs have significantly different mean body masses?

Help: Tukey's HSD test

4. Is there a significant linear relationship between flipper length and body mass of penguins?
